/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,liblatency_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o liblatency_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/latency_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/latency_interfaces/msg/latency_msg__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
